finalizeFirst: Finalize the date first — charging can only be activated on a finalized event.

deactivate.label: Deactivate
deactivate.title: Deactivate charging?
deactivate.description: Every unpaid charge is canceled — the Pix codes stop working. Paid charges are kept; refunds stay manual. Reactivating later creates fresh charges for anyone who hasn't paid.

drift: The budget changed since activation — deactivate and reactivate charging to reprice.
empty: The organizer hasn't set up the budget yet.
unsplitAlcohol: There are drink costs but no drinkers to split them — retag or remove those items.
unsplitMeat: There are meat costs but no meat-eaters to split them — retag or remove those items.
noItemsShare: No items yet — your share shows up once the budget has costs.

flags.hint: These affect how much you'll pay.
flags.locked: Charging is active — ask the admin to change your flags.

activation.minimumWarning: Base price minus both deductions must stay above zero — add an item everyone splits, or handle the exempt participants manually.
activation.title: Activate charging?
activation.description_one: This creates a Pix charge for the {{count}} approved participant. Prices are frozen — changing them later means deactivating and reactivating.
activation.description_other: This creates a Pix charge for each of the {{count}} approved participants. Prices are frozen — changing them later means deactivating and reactivating.

errors.amountPositive: Item amount must be a positive value
